'''Danchian Prime''' was a planet in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Dail sector/Legends|Dail sector]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Milko]] claimed to have a family on Danchian Prime, despite being a [[Droid/Legends|droid]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|15|Slippery Slope}} {{1stm}}
